reported_note: Ostrov Team had a transponder issue that was fixed early on.
analytics_resolution: Treat early Ostrov zero laps, lap reset, catch-up jump and immediate correction as confirmed timing/transponder artefacts, not pace, pit or suspicious driving behaviour.
downstream_rule: Keep official source-state records, but exclude affected rows from pace, delay, position-volatility and race-story movement analytics. Keep the later 15:24:52 lap jump unresolved unless additional race context confirms it belongs to the same issue.
